stemHtml: In a circling approach, how is the pilot expected to behave after initial visual contact with the runway has been established?

options.a: The circling manoeuvre will be continued even in case of momentary loss of visual references.
options.b: The circling prescribes tracks, which will be followed based primarily on instruments.
options.c: Immediately descend below MDA/Hand position the aircraft for landing.
options.d: Continue the circling at MDA/H keeping the runway environment in sight.
